name: Torrent Manager
description: Search, download, stream, and manage torrents using ThePirateBay search and WebTorrent technology. Search millions of torrents, add them for download, stream video content, and monitor progress.

tools.name: search_torrents
tools.description: Search for torrents using ThePirateBay API. Returns torrent name, magnet URI, seeders, leechers, size, category, uploader info, and verification status. Results are cached for 1 hour.

query.description: Search query (movie name, TV show, software, etc.)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: add_torrent
tools.description: Add a torrent to the download queue using a magnet URI. Creates a database record and starts downloading via WebTorrent service. Returns immediately with 'downloading' status without waiting for completion.

magnetUri.description: Magnet URI of the torrent (starts with magnet:?xt=urn:btih:)

infoHash.description: 40-character SHA1 info hash (extracted from magnet URI if not provided)

folder_id.description: Optional folder ID to organize the torrent

tools.name: get_torrent_status
tools.description: Get current status and progress of a torrent download. Returns progress percentage, download/upload speeds, peer count, and file information.

tools.name: download_torrent_to_storage
tools.description: Download torrent files and save them to permanent storage. WAITS for download to complete, then uploads files to storage system. Updates database with file IDs and creates operation record.

torrent_id.description: Database ID of the torrent to download

bucket_id.description: Storage bucket ID for file upload

folder_id.description: Folder ID to organize downloaded files

tools.name: stream_torrent
tools.description: Get streaming URL for torrent video files. Returns URL pointing to WebTorrent service for direct playback without waiting for full download. Supports range requests for video seeking.

file_index.description: Index of the file to stream (for multi-file torrents)

tools.name: remove_torrent
tools.description: Remove torrent from download queue and optionally delete files. Deletes database record, removes from WebTorrent service, and cancels active operations.

torrent_id.description: Database ID of the torrent to remove

delete_files.description: Also delete downloaded files from storage

tools.name: list_torrents
tools.description: List all torrents with optional filtering by status, project, or folder. Returns torrent metadata, progress, and statistics.
